title: Battle of New Alderaan (Hunt for Zsinj)
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Battle of New Alderaan}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Thyferra]]''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' |conc= |next=[[Attack on Selcaron]]{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} |image= |name=Battle of New Alderaan |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Hunt for Zsinj]])''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' |date=[[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] (42:10:1)''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |place=[[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]] |result=Evacuation of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] |side1=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side2=[[Zsinj's Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|What about New Alderaan? Support Services found you a nice place.''"
"''And five months ago some of Zsinj's agents discovered it. We had to evacuate, at least temporarily.|Han Solo and Leia Organa|}} Not long after the [[Battle of Thyferra|end]] of the [[Bacta War]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], a '''battle''' occurred during the [[Hunt for Zsinj]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] when the forces of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] discovered the location of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]. The planet was evacuated before his forces attacked, and it was at least five months before the [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] refugees could reclaim the world. Two days after the battle, Zsinj's forces [[Ambush at Gravan Seven|struck]] at [[Gravan Seven]].''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' {{ID|evacuation of New Alderaan}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Zsinj}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Nueva Alderaan (Campaña de Zsinj) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:New Alderaan (Hunt for Zsinj), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of New Alderaan]] [[Category:Battles of the Hunt for Zsinj]] [[Category:Evacuations]]
